---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be specific — include command syntax, config keys, or UI changes if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Scope

- [ ] New workflow agent
- [ ] Provider integration
- [ ] TUI / UX change
- [ ] CLI flag / REPL command
- [ ] Tooling (filesystem, terminal, web search)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to related issues, etc.
